{{Quote|I've been to Nauton IV, where Master Ruati was ''beheaded'' by an unknown assassin…|Obi-Wan Kenobi, on Ruati's death|<ref name="SWO" />}}
'''Ruati''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="SWO" /> In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="TCC" /> Ruati was [[Sai cha/Legends|beheaded]] by an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nauton IV]]. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] investigated his fellow Master's [[Death/Legends|death]] and came to the conclusion that the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]—whom Kenobi thought to be dead—was responsible for Ruati's murder.<ref name="SWO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ruati was first mentioned in [[Obsession 1|''Obsession'' 1]], the first issue of the ''[[Star Wars: Obsession]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], written by [[W. Haden Blackman]] and released on [[November 24]], [[2004]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. In [[2008]], Ruati received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
